title: build(deps-dev): bump vitest from 3.2.4 to 4.1.0 in /app
author: app/dependabot

findings.description: Major version bump vitest 3.x -> 4.x. Coordinate with PR #5901 (/frontend). CI must pass before merge.
This targets 4.1.0 while #5901 targets 4.1.8. Align both workspaces to the same vitest patch version.
